configurePresets.name: modules-standard-base
configurePresets.description: Third-party source/sink module set shipped in every official build (Windows, Linux .deb, AppImage, and the macOS base — macOS and Windows ARM64 flip a couple back OFF after inheriting this).

configurePresets.name: vs2026-x64-base
configurePresets.description: Common Visual Studio 2026 x64 settings. Concrete presets pin exactly one configuration so the app and deps prefixes cannot drift.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-x64-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 x64 Debug (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Configures SDR++ Debug against deps already built via deps/build-vs2026-x64-Debug.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-x64-relwithdebinfo
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 x64 RelWithDebInfo (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Configures SDR++ RelWithDebInfo against deps already built via deps/build-vs2026-x64-RelWithDebInfo.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-x64-release
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 x64 Release (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Configures SDR++ Release against deps already built via deps/build-vs2026-x64-Release.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-x64
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 x64 RelWithDebInfo (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Compatibility preset for the default Visual Studio x64 configuration. Uses deps/build-vs2026-x64-RelWithDebInfo.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-arm64-debug
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 ARM64 Debug (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Configures SDR++ ARM64 Debug against deps already built via deps/build-vs2026-arm64-Debug.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-arm64-relwithdebinfo
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 ARM64 RelWithDebInfo (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Configures SDR++ ARM64 RelWithDebInfo against deps already built via deps/build-vs2026-arm64-RelWithDebInfo.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-arm64-release
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 ARM64 Release (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Configures SDR++ ARM64 Release against deps already built via deps/build-vs2026-arm64-Release.

configurePresets.name: vs2026-arm64
configurePresets.displayName: Visual Studio 2026 ARM64 RelWithDebInfo (uses pre-built deps)
configurePresets.description: Compatibility preset for the default Visual Studio ARM64 configuration. Uses deps/build-vs2026-arm64-RelWithDebInfo.

configurePresets.name: msvc-vs-x64-debug
configurePresets.description: CI-friendly Visual Studio Debug build that bootstraps matching Debug deps without requiring a pre-configured developer shell.

configurePresets.name: msvc-vs-x64-relwithdebinfo
configurePresets.description: CI-friendly Visual Studio RelWithDebInfo build that bootstraps matching RelWithDebInfo deps without requiring a pre-configured developer shell.

configurePresets.name: msvc-vs-x64-release
configurePresets.description: CI-friendly Visual Studio Release build that bootstraps matching Release deps without requiring a pre-configured developer shell.

configurePresets.name: msvc-vs-arm64-debug
configurePresets.description: CI-friendly Visual Studio ARM64 Debug build that bootstraps matching Debug deps without requiring a pre-configured developer shell.

configurePresets.name: msvc-vs-arm64-relwithdebinfo
configurePresets.description: CI-friendly Visual Studio ARM64 RelWithDebInfo build that bootstraps matching RelWithDebInfo deps without requiring a pre-configured developer shell.

configurePresets.name: msvc-vs-arm64-release
configurePresets.description: CI-friendly Visual Studio ARM64 Release build that bootstraps matching Release deps without requiring a pre-configured developer shell.

configurePresets.name: ninja-msvc-base
configurePresets.description: Hidden base for Ninja+MSVC single-config builds. Run from a 'Developer PowerShell for VS 2026' (or vcvarsall'd shell) so cl.exe and ninja are on PATH. Each derived preset produces ONE configuration; switch configs by switching presets.

configurePresets.name: msvc-x64-debug
configurePresets.description: Single-config Debug build: /MDd everywhere, MSVC STL debug iterators active, full debuggability into app and deps. Builds its own deps tree under deps/build-default-Debug.

configurePresets.name: msvc-x64-relwithdebinfo
configurePresets.description: Single-config RelWithDebInfo build: /MD, optimized with PDBs. Builds its own deps tree under deps/build-default-RelWithDebInfo.

configurePresets.name: msvc-x64-release
configurePresets.description: Single-config Release build: /MD, fully optimized, no debug info. Builds its own deps tree under deps/build-default-Release.

configurePresets.name: msvc-arm64-release
configurePresets.description: Single-config ARM64 Release build: /MD, fully optimized, no debug info. Requires an ARM64-targeted MSVC developer shell. Uses a dedicated deps preset (default-arm64) so the deps tree does not collide with the x64 Ninja builds.

configurePresets.name: linux-default
configurePresets.description: Standard Linux dev build: relies on system pkg-config to resolve dependencies installed via apt.

configurePresets.name: ci-linux-deb
configurePresets.description: Used by docker_builds/do_build.sh inside the per-distro build containers. Bootstraps deps/ via OPT_BUILD_DEPS; module set is the standard one shipped in the .deb packages.

configurePresets.name: ci-appimage
configurePresets.description: Used by docker_builds/appimage/make_appimage.sh. Deps live in deps/build-appimage (no config suffix) to match the actions/cache key in build_appimage.yml.

configurePresets.name: ci-macos-base
configurePresets.description: Common settings for the macOS CI matrix in build_macos.yml. Concrete presets pin the m17_decoder/perseus_source combination for each runner leg.

configurePresets.name: ci-macos-intel
configurePresets.description: Used by build_macos.yml on the macos-15-intel runner leg.

configurePresets.name: ci-macos-arm
configurePresets.description: Used by build_macos.yml on the macos-15 (Apple Silicon) runner leg.
